creator: cedric@precidata.com
text:
I'm running with ports r476945 on 10.4, and it is failing.
Here is the end of my poudriers log:

[ 99%] Building CXX object Source/CMakeFiles/ccmake.dir/CursesDialog/ccmake.cxx.o
